rows.finalText: Around "What is the next right step in my calling", the reading gathers most strongly around purpose / calling, with a right path emphasis. With Stork (17) in the past, the reading shows where things already stand, and the picture is already being shaped by a healthy update ready to happen. At the pivot, Present places Ring (25) at the center, making this the point where the reading can shift. Here, Ring emphasizes agreements, repetition, mutual terms, and what keeps returning until it is consciously renewed or revised. The likely direction shows in Future through Clover (2), and it suggests small improvements that only matter if acted on quickly once the pivot is met directly. Clover often points to the luck, window, and ease layer of the situation in your calling. The path becomes clearest where Stork (17) meets Ring (25): a blend of change and commitment, asking you to sequence improvements deliberately while staying alert to staying bound to outdated commitments.
